##NAMES=Imayoshiite
##RRUFFID=R210019
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_3_Al(CO_3_)[B(OH)_4_](OH)_6_·12H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Shijiangshan Pb-Zn mine, Keshiketeng Co., Chifeng City, Inner Mongolia, China
##OWNER=Hercule Shen
##SOURCE=Hercule Shen
##DESCRIPTION=Clusters of stacked rose-colored hexagonal crystals associated with bakerite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R210019
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ca_3_(Al_0.78_Si_0.11_Fe_0.01_[box]_0.1_)([B(OH)_4_]_0.91_[CO_3_]_0.60_[SO_4_]_0.45_)(OH)_5.80_·12.39H_2_O
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 11.0663 b: 11.0663 c: 10.6387 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 1128.3 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
